ground_truth.title: Apply for Free Legal Help - Indiana Legal Services
ground_truth.main_content: Apply for Free Legal Assistance. Read below to find out how to apply for civil legal assistance. Get the Help You Need. If you have a non-criminal legal problem in Indiana, you can apply online or by phone for free legal help. Our assistance is generally targeted to low-income clients. Apply by phone: Monday – Thursday 10:00a.m. -2:00p.m. EST. 1-844-243-8570. Apply online: Monday – Friday 24/7. Online Application. Eligibility. ILS is able to provide free legal advice or representation to people who are eligible for our services. Our general eligibility guidelines can be found here. Our legal projects have different eligibility guidelines. If you are unsure of whether you may be eligible, we encourage you to apply. No person who applies for assistance and/or receives assistance from ILS will be discriminated against on the basis of race, color, sex, national origin, marital status, disability, age, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, health condition (including past or present health conditions), genetic information (including family medical history), veteran status or any other consideration prohibited by law. Other Resources. IN Free Legal Answers is a web page that allows you to post a question about your non-criminal legal problem and get an answer for free by an attorney. In order to qualify, you must be unable to afford to hire an attorney. To see if you are eligible and to ask a question now, visit IN Free Legal Answers. This service only provides answers to legal questions, the attorney who answers your question will not represent you in the full case or go to court for you. Last updated on December 2, 2024. If you have a non-criminal legal problem in Indiana, you can apply phone for free legal help. Our assistance is generally targeted to low-income clients. Jika memiliki masalah hukum non-kriminal di Indiana, dapat meminta bantuan hukum gratis melalui telepon. Jika vous avez un problème juridique non pénal dans l'Indiana, vous pouvez demander par téléphone une aide juridique gratuite. Si ou gen yon pwoblèm legal ki pa kriminèl nan Indiana, ou ka aplike telefòn pou èd legal gratis.
